commands.review_summary:
The PR adds declared plugin-tool and configured MCP-server allowlist context to tool-policy diagnostics across agent, embedded, gateway, and skill tool resolution paths.

PR surface: Source +149, Tests +93. Total +242 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main builds known plugin groups only from the current tool catalog, so declared optional plugin tools and configured MCP namespace globs can be treated as unknown before materialization. I did not run a live gateway repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Protected maintainer-label handling plus missing real behavior proof require human follow-up; the code defects are concrete, but automation should not take over this external PR while proof is absent.

target.title: fix(policy): recognize declared tool allowlists
target.body:
Fixes #77801.

## Summary
- Treat manifest-declared plugin tool names and plugin ids as known allowlist entries for diagnostics before the tools are materialized.
- Treat configured MCP server namespaces, including server-prefixed exact names/globs such as `paperless__*`, as known allowlist entries before bundled MCP tools are materialized.
- Preserve typo detection for undeclared MCP namespaces, so entries such as `papreless__*` still warn.

## Scope
- Internal tool-policy warning classification only.
- No config schema/options, CLI flags, migrations, or plugin public API/surface changes.
- Does not change actual tool filtering or materialization behavior.

## Validation
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/tool-policy-pipeline.test.ts src/agents/tool-policy.plugin-only-allowlist.test.ts src/plugins/tools.optional.test.ts src/agents/agent-bundle-mcp-tools.request-boundary.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `git diff --check`
- `/home/giodl/src/openclaw-85529/node_modules/oxfmt/bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/tool-policy.ts src/agents/tool-policy-declared-context.ts src/agents/tool-policy-pipeline.ts src/agents/agent-tools.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/effective-tool-policy.ts src/skills/runtime/tool-dispatch.ts src/gateway/tool-resolution.ts src/agents/tool-policy-pipeline.test.ts src/agents/tool-policy.plugin-only-allowlist.test.ts`
- `/home/giodl/src/openclaw-85529/node_modules/oxlint/bin/oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/agents/tool-policy.ts src/agents/tool-policy-declared-context.ts src/agents/tool-policy-pipeline.ts src/agents/agent-tools.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/effective-tool-policy.ts src/skills/runtime/tool-dispatch.ts src/gateway/tool-resolution.ts src/agents/tool-policy-pipeline.test.ts src/agents/tool-policy.plugin-only-allowlist.test.ts`

Note: Direct `tsgo -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --noEmit --pretty false` still stops on existing config I/O declaration errors unrelated to this PR: `src/config/io.ts(184,7)` and `src/secrets/config-io.ts(8,17)`.
